titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University buttons, pins, badges, and awards47-7-3789

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2024-09-17 23:59:10 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University buttons, pins, badges, and awards

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Collection contains buttons, pins, badges, and patches from Cornell University. Includes material from campus offices, events, classes, and general Cornelliana.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Cornell University Buttons, Pins, Badges, and Awards, #47-7-3789. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: This collection was created by archivists in the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "C" and "Class 1878"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "C" and "'84"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "C" and "Class 1887"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "C" and "Class 1888"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Gold button with red "C", black "'91"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Blue and white button with red "V", "Cornell 92 50th reunion", and blank strip for attendee name. One button (MU-616) has the name "Charles W. Dickens" printed on it.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "C" and "'93"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White 6.5 inch reunion button with red "93."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White 6.5 inch reunion button with red "94."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White 6.5 inch reunion button with red "95."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "Cornell 95"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "C" and "'96"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red border and red "'97". MU-623 belonged to B.K. Hough, MU-4736 belonged to Walter Provine.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White 6.5 inch reunion button with red "97."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "C" and "'98"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White 6.5 inch reunion button with red "98."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "Cornell '99."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White 6.5 inch reunion button with red "99."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White 6.5 inch reunion button with red "99" and "Barton"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White 6.5 inch reunion button with red "00."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White 6.5 inch reunion button with red "01."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "C" and "'06"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White 6.5 inch reunion button with red "04."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with "Cornell '06" in red. Blank copy.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with "Cornell '07" in red. Blank copies.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Yellow pinback button with red "C" and yellow "50th reunion". Blank copy.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White pin with green writing, "1912 Cornell Son"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White pinback button with green "C" and "1912", white "50th reunion", and red "Cornell". Two blank copies.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with green border and green "55th 1912", red "Cornell." Blank copy.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "C", red "1916 50th", and white "Class of" and "reunion." Blank copies.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red border and red "Cornell 1919"

did.unittitle: Cornell reunion pinback button, class of 1922, 1923, and 1924

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White with red letters, large "C", and "'22, '23, '24"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White pinback button with red "C" and red "1923 50th", and white "Class of" and "reunion." Name written in marker: Elsie Curtis Conner.

did.unittitle: Class of 1925 pinback button "'25"; white with red letters

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "Cornell '29." Blank copy.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "Cornell '33." Blank copy.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "Cornell '37." Blank copy.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "Cornell '49". Name pencilled in: Joe Cornell.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with the Cornell bear leaning against a red "C 54." The eyes of the bear can light up.

did.unittitle: Subseries Ib. General Cornell pins and buttons
CAA pinback button, white with red letters
CAA pinback button, white with red letters
CAA pinback button, red with white letters
White pinback button with red stripe
Red pinback button with white "C", with one white stripe through it
Red pinback button with white "C", with white X through it

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Four pins presented to Ethel Olson, administrative assistant for Cooperative Extension Administration. Includes pins for 20, 25, 30, and 35 years of service.

did.unittitle: Cornell pushback pin, half red and half white "Cornell"
Cornell pushback pin, half red and half white "Cornell" with bear in glasses
White pinback button with red "Oh, Beebe!"
3 lobed wooden medallion with image of campus: "Cornell University, Ithaca, NY"
Cornell pin attached to a ribbon and metal football
Gold bear leaning against red "C" pin
Cornell pin, red and white with bust of E. Cornell - from William G. Hanes, Los Angeles, by way of the President's Office

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White with red letters, "Cornell day guest, name, hometown". Name penciLled in: Joe Doe.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: white with red letters "C.R.C.". MU-657 has "'08" in red pencil. MU-658 has Jack Stoddard pencilled in.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "Cornell." Name pencilled in: Doc Water.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White pinback button with red "Cornell." Name pencilled in: Jim Jackson. Note that the font is different than MU-659.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red "Cornell." Printed on button: Frank R. Clifford '50, Director of Alumni Affairs.

did.unittitle: Cornell Reunion Tour Guide pinback button

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: White button with red writing. Name pencilled on: Hunt Bradley '26.

did.unittitle: Subseries Ic. Colleges, Groups, and Other
Red cloth pinback button with gold "KA"
Membership pin of the Huntington Club, Cornell University
College of Arts and Sciences learning for a lifetime Cornell pinback button
Pinback button, "Sebela WEHE Lives! In the old armory. Disguised as a member of the class of '38!"
Princeton class of 1903 reunion pinback button

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Orange with black letters, "Princeton 1903"

did.unittitle: Princeton class of 1910 reunion pinback button

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Orange with black letters and black rim, "Princeton 1910", white space for name.

did.unittitle: Princeton class of 1915 reunion pinback button

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Orange with black and orange letters, "35th 1917 35th"

did.unittitle: Princeton class of 1940 10th reunion pinback button

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Orange with black letters, "1940 10th reunion"

did.unittitle: Cornell '58 patch, white with red lettering

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Navy patch with embroidered crest and 1954.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Appears to be cut off from a jacket.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Patch has raised embroidery and metalwork.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Metalwork CU embroidery on black fabric. Appears to have been cut from a jacket.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cornell emblem embroidered in yellow, red, and white.

did.unittitle: White ribbon with red letters, "Cornell Day"
Class of 1897 reunion card, red with white, "'97"
